target: ACL27 supplement page 41 theory hypothesis-boundary companion v6
reason_independent_review_not_used: Subagent spawning is restricted to explicit user requests in this environment; review followed the render-visual-reviewer and research-figure-ai-slot-composer checklists locally.

measurement.layout_guard_active_definition: RGB pixels where max(channel)-min(channel) > 15 or mean(channel) < threshold, matching tests/test_paper_layout.py figure-density checks.
measurement.page_active245_definition: RGB pixels where max(channel)-min(channel) > 15 or mean(channel) < 245, matching the sparse-page density audit.
measurement.red_pixel_fraction_definition: RGB pixels where R > 150, G < 90, and B < 90, matching tests/test_paper_layout.py red fallback checks.

layout_iteration.before: The v5 companion already used registered render lanes but the AI slot was still a generated hypothesis-boundary schematic path that could be center-cropped by the composer.
layout_iteration.after: The v6 companion uses a newly generated denser hypothesis-boundary AI slot, contain placement for the AI slot, and deterministic checkpoint cards backed by material, grounding, and selected-failure render crops.
layout_iteration.ai_slot_containment_update: The composer now uses contain scaling for THEORY_HYPOTHESIS_BOUNDARY_V6_AI_SLOT instead of cover scaling, following the updated AI slot composition rule that generated slots should not be cropped or occluded unless an explicit reviewed crop is intended.
layout_iteration.fit_adjustment: A trial 0.48 textheight placement improved the page figure size but created a sparse orphan page 42 and expanded the supplement to 46 pages. A 0.42 trial still left page 42 as a near-empty single-line tail. The accepted placement returns to 0.40 textheight so H.5 closes on page 41 and page 42 starts the reproducibility manifest.
layout_iteration.result: Accepted with caveat: the standalone companion and local figure crop are denser and no longer crop the AI slot; whole-page density changes only slightly because page 41 remains a theory text page.

visual_review.standalone_figure: PASS: the render lanes, selected failure wall, cross-hypothesis audit strip, and v6 boundary lens are visibly contained and no panel overlaps its card.
visual_review.ai_slot_asset: PASS: the raw v6 AI slot is denser than v5, contains no readable words, numbers, logos, or watermarks, and functions as an exposition-only schematic.
visual_review.ai_slot_composed_crop: PASS: the composed bottom crop shows the AI slot inside a proportioned contain box, with deterministic checkpoint cards beside it and no center-crop loss.
visual_review.pdf_page_41: PASS: Figure S39, caption, H.4, and H.5 fit on page 41 with no clipping, overlap, or caption collision.
visual_review.neighbor_pages: PASS: page 40 remains the failure-mode interpretation map; page 42 starts the reproducibility review-packet manifest after the accepted 0.40 textheight rollback.
visual_review.claim_boundary: PASS: the caption and deterministic footer keep the AI boundary lens exposition-only and state that it is not a new experiment, causal proof, or population rate.
visual_review.residual_risk: The whole-page active-density gain is minimal at page scale; future iterations should target p40, p37, or other low-density non-formula pages for larger visual-density gains.
